rationale: The cited paper appears potentially substantive because both studies model dynamic advertising effects with carryover and cross-channel interaction/spillover constructs (multimedia synergy in 2003 vs. generic-to-branded spillover via latent awareness in 2011). Methodologically, the cited work’s state-space/Kalman-filter dynamic framework is plausibly a theory/method precursor to the citing paper’s Bayesian dynamic linear model, so this is not an obvious incidental mention.
